title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Sun Pharmaceutical

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Sun Pharmaceutical
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!
